<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by /forge:init — confidence: 88% -->
# Deployment

## Distribution Model

Forge is distributed as a GitHub-hosted Claude Code plugin. There is no build
step — the plugin ships as source files from the `forge/` subdirectory.

## Install Path (Users)

```
/plugin marketplace add Entelligentsia/forge
/plugin install forge@forge
```

The plugin manager clones `forge/` from the GitHub repository into
`~/.claude/plugins/cache/forge/forge/{VERSION}/`.

## Update Path (Users)

The `check-update.js` hook detects new versions at session start by fetching:
```
https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Entelligentsia/forge/main/forge/.claude-plugin/plugin.json
```

When a new version is detected:
1. User sees: "Forge X.Y.Z available. Run: /plugin install Entelligentsia/forge"
2. User installs: `/plugin install forge@forge`
3. Next session: hook detects version change, prompts: "Run /forge:update"
4. User runs `/forge:update` to propagate changes into project artifacts

## Release Process

1. All changes to `forge/` bump the version in `forge/.claude-plugin/plugin.json`
2. Migration entry added to `forge/migrations.json`
3. Security scan run with `/security-watchdog:scan-plugin forge:forge`
4. Scan report saved to `docs/security/scan-v{VERSION}.md`
5. README security table updated
6. Commit pushed to `main`

## Repository Structure

```
/                           ← repo root (this project)
  forge/                    ← distributed plugin (what users install)
    .claude-plugin/
      plugin.json           ← version source of truth
    commands/               ← slash command definitions
    hooks/                  ← event hooks
    tools/                  ← deterministic CJS tools
    schemas/                ← JSON Schema files
    meta/                   ← meta-definitions for init generation
    init/                   ← init orchestration
    migrations.json
  .claude-plugin/
    marketplace.json        ← marketplace descriptor
  docs/                     ← documentation and security scan reports
  assets/                   ← images, hero banner
  engineering/              ← this project's SDLC knowledge base (not distributed)
  .forge/                   ← this project's Forge instance (not distributed)
```

## Environment Variables

| Variable | Used by | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT` | All hooks | Path to installed plugin directory |
| `CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA` | `check-update.js` | Cache dir (default: `/tmp/forge-plugin-data`) |
| `CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA_ROOT` | `list-skills.js` | Base dir for plugins file lookup |
| `CLAUDE_SKILLS_DIR` | `list-skills.js` | Personal skills directory |
